sys_script.name: Maintaince_Status _open

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_e8e3483fc3d803100ccab1fdd4013107
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_451445_wrm_workspace_maintenance</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Maintaince_Status _open</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous) {

//Workspace option table
    var workspaceGR = new GlideRecord('x_451445_wrm_workspace_options');
    var ticketStatus =
        current.getValue('ticket_status');
    var mainWorkspaceStatus =
        current.getValue('workspace_status');

    if (ticketStatus == 'open' && mainWorkspaceStatus == 'in_maintenance') {
        workspaceGR.status = 'in_maintenancee';
    } else if (ticketStatus == 'closed' && mainWorkspaceStatus == 'available') {
        workspaceGR.status = 'available';

    } else if (ticketStatus == 'closed' && mainWorkspaceStatus == 'decomissioned') {
        workspaceGR.status = 'decommissioned';
    } else if (ticketStatus == 'closed' && mainWorkspaceStatus == 'available') {
        workspaceGR.status = 'available';
    }

    workspaceGR.update();

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-23 15:29:48</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>e8e3483fc3d803100ccab1fdd4013107</sys_id><sys_mod_count>4</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Maintaince_Status _open</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Workspace Reservation Management" source="x_451445_wrm">a64abe87c388cb100ccab1fdd4013104</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Workspace Reservation Management">a64abe87c388cb100ccab1fdd4013104</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_e8e3483fc3d803100ccab1fdd4013107</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-23 19:31:45</sys_updated_on><template/><when>after</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=e8e3483fc3d803100ccab1fdd4013107"/></record_update>
